title: Vectors, Matrices, Transformations, and Data Systems · Decision Notebook: Matrix Applications
summary: Represent flows and transformations across a small service system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int matrix applications increment in a matrix-based flow and transformation model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build transition, network, and resource matrices from domain relationships.
Interpret determinants as signed scale factors and singularity evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Matrix Applications evidence
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: For a 2×2 matrix, determinant = ad − bc. Use (4 × 7) − (1 × 2).

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: For a 2×2 matrix, determinant = ad − bc. Use (4 × 7) − (1 × 2).
